title: Berlin Plug Adapter - Quick Summary
items: **Berlin uses Type F / Schuko sockets** with 230V power at 50Hz. Most non-European travelers need a Type F / Europe adapter.
**Check the charger label before the wall socket.** If it says Input: 100-240V, 50/60Hz, phones and laptops usually need only the plug-shape adapter.
**Do not trust a simple adapter for 110/120V-only devices.** Hair dryers, straighteners and old high-heat tools are the main risk.
**USB-C still needs a wall plan.** Bring a dual-voltage USB-C charger, a short cable and one reliable adapter.
**Power banks belong in carry-on bags when flying.** Check airline limits for large batteries.
**Forgot an adapter?** Try BER airport shops, Hauptbahnhof, Alexanderplatz, electronics stores, larger drugstores or hotel reception.
